title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 09 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 09 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 09 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.79 % today, the main contract closed at 939. The steel mills are notactive to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is less. PBF at Shandong port deal 965-967 yuan/mt.
